description: When the user supplies obviously-too-short input ("AB"), the chatbot must respond CALMLY: ask for a complete plate, explain what a valid plate looks like, and surface no technical jargon (regex, ValidationError, the literal string "format_error"). It may either call lookup_plate and surface the structured format_error, or pre-empt the wasted CarsXE credit by asking for a full plate first. Both behaviours satisfy system-prompt rule #5; what matters is that the recovery prose is calm and instructive, never scolding and never technical.

turns.message: look up plate AB in CA
